case_title: CHRISTOPHER GUILBERT SCHULZ VS. DEREK JUSTINLEE SIMMONS ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHULZ, CHRISTOPHER GUILBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMMONS, DEREK JUSTINLEE $1,348.37 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,433.37, PLAINTIFF MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT DEFENDANT SIMMONS CAUSED THE ACCIDENT AND FOR THE DAMAGES SOUGHT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF AS TO ESTABLISHING NEGLIGENCE AGAINST DEFENDANT PAYLESS RENTAL CAR IN THE ABSENCE OF RENTAL INSURANCE FROM PAYLESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,348.37 FILED BY SCHULZ, CHRISTOPHER GUILBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS, DEREK JUSTINLEE PAYLESS CAR RENTAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CORPORATION SERVICE COMPANY) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHULZ, CHRISTOPHER GUILBERT AS TO DEFENDANT PAYLESS CAR RENTAL, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY SCHULZ, CHRISTOPHER GUILBERT SIMMONS, DEREK JUSTINLEE PAYLESS CAR RENTAL, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PAYLESS CAR RENTAL, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-14-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAYLESS CAR RENTAL, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAY-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS, DEREK JUSTINLEE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DIANE LITTS--RETAINED INDEPENDENT INSURANCE ADJUSTER W/FRYE CLAIMS. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
